Brand.name: Nibble
Brand.tagline: Snap the plate. Know if they got enough.

Landing.heroTitle: Your baby ate. But did they eat enough?
Landing.heroSub: Every parent has wondered if today's meals really covered everything. Nibble does the math for you — snap any meal, see exactly which of the 19 essential nutrients your baby got, and what still needs a top-up before bedtime.
Landing.noCreditCard: No credit card. Cancel anytime. Your peace of mind, on the house.
Landing.demoSuggestion: A few nutrients still a touch low — a yogurt, a yolk, or a spoon of nut butter at dinner closes the gap 🥄
Landing.empathySub: We built Nibble because we've been there too — staring at a half-eaten plate, wondering if it counts.
Landing.empathy3: "Why does my pediatrician keep saying 'just offer variety'?"
Landing.empathy4: "Grandma says one thing, the book says another, my friend says a third…"
Landing.pain1Desc: Your pediatrician's appointment ended before they got to the actual answer.
Landing.pain2Desc: You did your best with today's meals — but you still don't know if today's targets actually got hit.
Landing.pain3Desc: Peanuts, eggs, shellfish, honey, fish — when to start, how much, what to watch for.
Landing.pain4Desc: WhatsApp groups, in-laws, books, blogs. They contradict each other. Daily.
Landing.howTitle: Nibble is the gentle co-pilot you've been wishing for
Landing.how1Desc: One photo. No weighing, no typing, no spreadsheet — even with one hand and a baby on your hip.
Landing.how2Desc: All 19 nutrients, decoded in 3 seconds — every macro, vitamin, mineral, fibre and omega-3 your baby needs at this age.
Landing.how3Desc: Today's targets, all in one view. Know what's covered. Know what's missing. Know what to serve next.
Landing.videoSub: 60 seconds. One real meal. Watch how it works.
Landing.featuresTitle: Built for the worried, the loving, and the deeply unsure
Landing.finalCtaDesc: 7 days free. No credit card. Just a calmer feeding day, every day.
Landing.emailCaptureTitle: Not ready to sign up yet?
Landing.emailCaptureSub: Leave your email — we'll send launch news and a founding-member invite when signups open.

Login.tagline: Snap the plate. Know if they got enough.
Login.title: Sign in to continue
Login.sub: We use Google sign-in so your data syncs across devices and survives cache-clears. Your 7-day free trial starts after sign-in.
Login.legal: By continuing, you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

Disclaimer.footer: Educational use only. Not medical advice. Always consult your pediatrician.
Disclaimer.aiResponse: This is educational information only, not medical advice. Please contact your pediatrician with any concerns.

Onboarding.welcomeSub: Tell us a bit about your baby so we can tailor nutrition targets by age.
Onboarding.step1Sub: A nickname is fine — no last name needed.
Onboarding.sexHint: Used for the growth trend chart only.
Onboarding.step2Sub: We calculate age from DOB and tailor nutrition guidance to the right bucket.
Onboarding.dobUnsupported: Nibble is tuned for ages 6 months to 4 years. We'll still log your baby's data, but some features may not apply.
Onboarding.step3Title: How are you feeding right now?
Onboarding.step3Sub: There's no wrong answer — you can change this anytime.
Onboarding.feedingBlwDesc: Offer foods baby picks up themselves to build chewing + coordination.
Onboarding.feedingPureeDesc: Smooth, spoon-fed textures, gradually thickening up.
Onboarding.feedingMixedDesc: Some purée plus finger foods, day by day.
Onboarding.step4Sub: Foods a pediatrician confirmed — or ones you suspect. Skip if none.
Onboarding.step5Sub: Nibble is an educational tool, not a medical service. Please confirm you understand before we start.
Onboarding.consentItem1: Nibble's feeding suggestions are for educational reference only, not medical advice.
Onboarding.consentItem2: For any health concern I will consult a pediatrician or qualified provider.
Onboarding.consentItem3: All decisions are mine — Nibble just helps me keep notes organized.
Onboarding.consentCheckbox: I understand and agree with the above

Scan.title: Snap your baby's plate
Scan.sub: Get the whole plate in frame — Nibble identifies every food and its nutrients.
Scan.noChildWarning: Create a baby profile first so we can match age-appropriate targets.
Scan.nutrientsHint: Targets are for the whole day — this meal is one contribution.
Scan.perFoodHint: How much each food contributes to today's daily target.
Scan.allergenWarningBody: This plate may contain the following flagged allergens: {allergens}. Please double-check before feeding.
Scan.faceDetectedError: The photo contains a face and we don't analyze those — please photograph just the plate.
Scan.noFoodsError: We couldn't identify any food. Try better lighting and include the whole plate.
Scan.disclaimer: Nutrient estimates use WHO/AAP averages — individual babies may differ.
Scan.historyEmpty: No meals logged yet. Snap your first plate to see it here.

Chat.title: Ask Nibble
Chat.emptySub: Ask anything about today's nutrition, recipe ideas, age-appropriate snacks, or what's coming next. I see what you've logged today, so I can be specific.
Chat.suggest1: What did we eat today, and what nutrients are still missing?
Chat.suggest2: Suggest a dinner recipe to fill today's biggest gap
Chat.suggest3: Why are these nutrients important at this age?
Chat.suggest4: What's a good snack idea right now?
Chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about today's nutrition, recipes, snacks…
Chat.composerFooter: Educational reference only. For any symptom or concern, please contact your pediatrician.
Chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Pricing.title: Plans that scale with your family
Pricing.sub: Start free for 7 days. Cancel anytime — no questions.
Pricing.planFreeBlurb: Everything you need to try Nibble and build the daily habit.
Pricing.planPremiumBlurb: The full tracker. Unlimited scans, chat, and growth trend charts.
Pricing.planFamilyBlurb: Share with up to 4 caregivers — grandparents, nanny, partner.
Pricing.featuresPoopSleep: Poop, sleep, milestone, reaction, growth logs
Pricing.featuresPercentilesFull: Full growth trend chart (WHO percentiles coming soon)
Pricing.foundingBody: One-time NT$2,888 / HK$749. Unlocks Premium forever and supports a small solo team building Nibble. Limited to 200 seats.
Pricing.faq1A: Yes — before the trial ends and you're never charged. After that, cancel from the customer portal at any time and your plan stays active until the end of the billing cycle.
Pricing.faq2A: Absolutely not. Nibble is an educational tracker. For any health concern, contact your pediatrician. We refuse to diagnose, prescribe, or advise on medication.
Pricing.faq3A: Yes. Photos never leave Google Gemini's processing pipeline, we never store faces, and your logs live in your own Supabase row with row-level security.
Pricing.faq4Q: Can I use it for multiple children?
Pricing.faq4A: Free is one profile. Premium and Family support unlimited profiles. Family also lets up to 4 caregivers share one account.
Pricing.trustLine: Loved by parents in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Singapore.
Pricing.cantCheckout: Checkout isn't live yet — we'll email when your account is ready.
Pricing.checkoutError: Something went wrong starting checkout. Please try again in a moment.

Paywall.title: Upgrade to keep going
Paywall.successBody: Your 7-day trial has started — unlimited scans, AI chat, full percentiles. Happy tracking!
Paywall.syncFailedBody: Your payment went through but we couldn't read the subscription status. Refresh this page, or open your customer portal to confirm.

Newsletter.thanksBody: We'll email you the moment Nibble opens for sign-ups.
Newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of Nibble (寶貝小口), a consumer tracker that helps parents log their baby's meals, sleep, poops, milestones, reactions, and growth. Please read them alongside our Privacy Policy — together they describe what Nibble is, what it isn't, and how we handle your family's data.
Terms.natureBody:
Nibble is an educational tracking tool. It helps you photograph meals, log data, and understand general nutritional and developmental guidance drawn from WHO, AAP, and local pediatric sources.

Nibble is NOT a medical service. It does not diagnose, treat, prescribe, or replace a qualified pediatrician. Any AI-generated content you see inside the app is for general reference only.
Terms.notMedicalBody: Every response Nibble gives is educational. You must not rely on it as a substitute for advice from a pediatrician or licensed healthcare provider. If your baby has any symptom, reaction, or concern, contact your pediatrician or local emergency service immediately. We refuse to answer dosing, diagnosis, or prescription questions — by design.
Terms.eligibilityBody: You must be at least 18 years old and the parent or primary caregiver of the child or children you log data about. Nibble is not designed for children to use directly — it is a tool for caregivers.
Terms.accountBody: When accounts ship, you'll be responsible for keeping your login secure. While we're in pre-account mode, your data lives in your device's local storage and only syncs to our servers when you explicitly start a subscription and account.
Terms.subscriptionsBody: Premium and Family plans begin with a 7-day free trial. You will not be charged during the trial. Subscriptions auto-renew at the interval you choose (monthly or annual) unless you cancel before the renewal date from your customer portal. Refunds follow the consumer protection rules of your jurisdiction — contact us if something went wrong.
Terms.contentBody: You own the meals, photos, notes, and measurements you log. You grant Nibble a limited license to process that content solely to provide the service to you (for example, sending a meal photo to our AI pipeline so the nutrient analysis can come back). We do not sell your content.
Terms.photosBody: Nibble's image pipeline is designed to reject photos in which a human face is detected. If you accidentally upload a photo with a face, our analysis will refuse and you'll be asked to retake. We do not retain plate photos after analysis unless you explicitly save them.
Terms.acceptableBody: You agree not to: (a) use Nibble to circumvent medical care for a child in distress, (b) share your paid account with strangers, (c) attempt to reverse-engineer or scrape the service, (d) use Nibble for commercial nutrition counseling or clinical practice.
Terms.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Nibble and its operators are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability for any claim is limited to the amount you paid us in the twelve months before the claim. Nothing in these Terms limits liability for fraud or matters that cannot be limited by law.
Terms.changesTitle: 10. Changes to the service and to these Terms
Terms.changesBody: We may update the service or these Terms as Nibble evolves. Material changes will be announced in-app or by email. Continued use after an update means you accept the revised Terms.
Terms.governingBody: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Any dispute that cannot be resolved amicably will be handled in the courts of Hong Kong, unless your local consumer law requires otherwise.
Terms.contactBody: For questions, concerns, refund requests, or anything in between: hello@trynibble.app.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Policy explains what Nibble (寶貝小口) collects, why, how it's stored, and what choices you have. It's written in plain language because parents read it while rocking a baby to sleep, not in a boardroom.
Privacy.promise1: We never store photos of your child's face — the pipeline rejects them at the gate.
Privacy.promise2: Plate photos are processed in-memory by our AI provider and are not retained after the nutrient analysis.
Privacy.promise3: Your logs live only in your device or, once you subscribe, in your own Supabase row with row-level security.
Privacy.promise4: We never sell your data. Full stop.
Privacy.whoWeAreBody: Nibble is operated by a solo founder based in Hong Kong. Contact: hello@trynibble.app.
Privacy.whatWeCollectBody:
Account and billing data: your email, and the Stripe customer identifier once you start a subscription. Payment card details are handled by Stripe directly; we never see them.

Child profile data: the nickname, biological sex (for WHO growth-curve plotting), date of birth, feeding style, and known allergens you enter during onboarding.

Log data: meals, portions, nutrient estimates, poops, sleep, milestones, reaction events, and growth measurements you log.

Technical data: basic request logs (IP, user agent, timestamp) for security and debugging.
Privacy.howWeUseBody: We use your data to run the service you asked for: analyze meals, show nutrient progress, plot growth curves, and return relevant chat answers. We also use aggregate, non-identifying metrics to understand product performance (retention, feature adoption).
Privacy.photoHandlingBody: When you photograph a plate, the image is sent to Google Gemini 2.5 Flash for analysis. The image is transmitted over TLS, processed in-memory by the model, and discarded after the response. If a human face is detected, the model refuses and asks you to retake — we treat faces as a hard rejection at the model layer, not a soft warning in the UI.
Privacy.aiProcessingBody: AI features (plate analysis, chat) are powered by Google Gemini via the Google AI Studio API. Your prompts and relevant context are sent to Google for processing. Per Google's enterprise API terms, inputs are not used to train their models. Even so, avoid sending identifying personal health information beyond what Nibble asks for.
Privacy.storageBody:
Pre-account: everything you enter stays in your device's local storage and is not sent to our servers.

Post-account (subscribers): your logs are stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL) in the region closest to you. Every row is protected by row-level security so only your account can read it.
Privacy.sharingBody: We share data with a small set of sub-processors that power the service: Stripe (payments), Supabase (database), Google (AI), Resend (email), Vercel (hosting), and our analytics provider. We do not sell data to advertisers or data brokers.
Privacy.retentionBody: We keep your logs as long as your account is active, plus 30 days after cancellation so you can re-activate. After that, personal data is deleted or anonymized. Billing records may be retained longer where required by tax law.
Privacy.rightsBody: You can request access, correction, export, or deletion of your data at any time by emailing hello@trynibble.app. We'll respond within 30 days. You can also use the in-app data export (once shipped) to download a JSON copy of your logs.
Privacy.cookiesBody: Nibble uses local storage to remember your baby's profile and preferences, and cookies for session, language, and referral tracking. You can clear both at any time from your browser; doing so will sign you out and reset pre-account logs.
Privacy.childrenBody: Nibble is designed for caregivers to log information about their child. We do not knowingly collect data directly from children. When Nibble expands into jurisdictions with strict children's-data regulation (e.g. COPPA, the UK Age Appropriate Design Code), we will apply those rules before launch in that market.
Privacy.internationalBody: Because Google, Stripe, and our other providers are global, your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. All transfers rely on the sub-processor's standard contractual clauses or equivalent safeguards.
Privacy.changesBody: We'll update this Policy as the product evolves. Material changes will be announced in-app or by email; continued use after an update means you accept the revised Policy.
Privacy.contactBody: Email hello@trynibble.app. We read every message.
